We believe moments
deserve to be built.

BrickPic turns any image into a precision LEGO Art mosaic — using real parts, real colors, and a BrickLink shopping list so you can build it yourself. No middleman. No markup. Just your photo, in bricks.

🎯

Pixel Perfect

Our color algorithm maps every pixel to the closest real LEGO color using perceptual color science — not just RGB distance.

🧱

Build Together

The 9-module Premium system lets multiple people build at once. Each 16×16 panel snaps together at the end.

📦

BrickLink Ready

One click exports a full XML Wanted List for BrickLink — the world's largest marketplace for LEGO parts.

💸

No Markup

You buy directly from BrickLink sellers. BrickPic just generates the plan — free forever.

Build your Mosaic — it's free →

Mosaic bestellen

Füll das Formular aus — wir melden uns innerhalb von 24h mit Zahlungslink und Bestätigung.

Nach dem Absenden bekommst du eine Bestätigungsmail. Dein Bild kannst du dann direkt per Email schicken.
